_comment: Phase A: Tìm best seq_len cho recursive H=30. Window train = seq_len+1 (H=1). ctx_len = seq_len+H-1 = seq_len+29.
_constraint: val_min=64 (Store 674). val_loader windows = val_days - seq_len. seq_len<=60: Store 674 có 4+ windows. seq_len=63: absolute max (Store 674 có 1 window). Safe upper bound: 60.
_note: Step=7 (weekly seasonality). train≈val loss → seq_len là lever chính trước regularization/arch.
